title: Mellow Dutch Cheese Gratin
description: A comforting, umami-rich Dutch cheese gratin perfect for a sick day with a soothing, creamy cheese filling and a crispy top.

ingredients.name: Gouda cheese (low-moisture, 250g)
ingredients.notes: Dutch Gouda cheese is key to this dish.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: Use fresh milk for best results.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter adds a rich flavor to the cheese.

ingredients.name: Creme Fraiche
ingredients.notes: Creme Fraiche adds a tangy flavor and creamy texture.

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: Fresh thyme adds a subtle, herbal flavor.

instructions: In a saucepan, combine milk, butter, and salt, and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
In a separate saucepan, combine Gouda cheese and creme fraiche, and stir until the cheese is melted and smooth.
Stir the cheese mixture into the milk mixture and bring to a simmer.
Remove from heat and stir in black pepper and thyme.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and let it rest for 10 minutes, allowing the cheese to set.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
